evals.prompt: I have an idea file at ideas/idea-dev-multyagent-assistant.md. Interview me just enough to stabilize it, then write a planning-ready brief to researcher/docs/vision.md. I may use sdd-specify after that, but do not create a feature spec yet.
evals.expected_output: Creates researcher/docs/vision.md as a Markdown idea brief, preserves the source idea, includes scenarios, assumptions, risks, architecture-affecting unknowns, open questions, and an SDD seed without acceptance criteria.

evals.prompt: I am not in a project repo yet. Rough idea: a local-first tool that helps me turn scattered research notes into a publishable essay. Make a deep initial vision document and save it to /tmp/research-notes-vision.md.
evals.expected_output: Works without repo assumptions, asks or states assumptions for a deep idea interview, writes a portable Markdown vision document to the requested path, and highlights research, workflow, data lifecycle, and trust risks.

evals.prompt: Before I plan this with any framework, help me work on this idea: an AI code-review assistant for small teams. Keep it short, write the brief inline, and tell me whether the next step should be SDD specify, research, or a prototype.
evals.expected_output: Returns an inline short idea brief with the template's core sections, avoids writing files because inline was requested, challenges assumptions, maps scenarios and risks, and recommends a specific next planning path.
